hypotheses.title: Resource-Theoretic Mpemba Vulnerability Score: Relative Entropy of A* Ensemble as Unified Aggregation Predictor

attacks.finding: CRITICAL: 'Avanzini et al. (2026, PRX 16:011065)' is fabricated or severely misattributed. The resource-theoretic Mpemba unification paper (arXiv 2507.16976) is by Summer, Moroder, Bettmann, Turkeshi, Marvian, and Goold -- no Avanzini. It is an arXiv preprint, NOT published in PRX 16:011065. The hypothesis is anchored to a citation that does not exist as described.

D_KL spectral decomposition 'D_KL = sum_k (c_k)^2 / (2|lambda_k|)' attributed to Lu & Raz 2017 is not standard. This formula applies to chi-squared divergence near equilibrium, not KL divergence for arbitrary distributions. D_KL = delta_F/kT holds only near equilibrium; A* ensemble is far from equilibrium.

Claim that D_KL is SMALLER for amyloidogenic proteins conflates thermodynamic proximity with kinetic accessibility. If A* is closer to equilibrium, it is more thermodynamically accessible (higher equilibrium population), but Mpemba condition requires specific eigenmode overlap, not just small D_KL.
Bridge rests on fabricated citation. Actual resource-theoretic Mpemba work (Summer et al. 2025) focuses on symmetry restoration and athermality, not protein landscapes.

Chakraborty 2020 VERIFIED. Klich 2019 VERIFIED. Lu & Raz 2017 VERIFIED. But anchor citation (Avanzini PRX) is fabricated. 1/4 GROUNDED tags hallucinated -- same class of error Generator claimed to have eliminated.
Concept of resource-theoretic unification is genuinely novel.
Predictions specific and falsifiable. PASSES.
IDP systems have continuous eigenvalue spectra; >80% concentration in 2 slowest modes may be structurally impossible.
Claims 'unified' from 4 pairs. Limited.

critic_questions: Provide correct citation for resource-theoretic Mpemba unification. Summer et al. 2025 arXiv 2507.16976, not Avanzini 2026 PRX?
Is D_KL = sum c_k^2/(2|lambda_k|) actually chi-squared divergence, not KL?
How does D_KL = delta_F/kT hold for A* excited state far from equilibrium?
hypotheses.survival_note: Novel concept but anchor citation fabricated, math formula possibly wrong. WOUNDED -- could be rebuilt on correct foundations.

hypotheses.title: Mpemba-Guided Aggregation Inhibitor Design: Small Molecules That Maximize Eigenmode Overlap Disruption

attacks.finding: Eigenmode landscape changes upon ligand binding. Reweighting exp(-delta_G_bind/kT) is perturbative, fails for strong binders. Born-Oppenheimer timescale separation unverified for IDP ligands.
Enrichment factor >2 is good but known inhibitors (EGCG, Congo red) are promiscuous. Negative controls (ATP, glucose) too dissimilar. Need structurally similar non-inhibitors.
Artificial Mpemba condition through selective microstate stabilization is creative and well-defined.
Abeta42 is IDP with no stable binding pockets. fpocket/POVME designed for folded proteins. Mpemba-target microstates may lack pocketable surface.
All 4 GROUNDED citations verified: Klich 2019, Bowman & Geissler 2012 (PNAS 109:11681), Bulawa 2012 (PNAS 109:9629), Husic & Pande 2018. No errors. Best citation accuracy.
Eigenmode-overlap-guided drug design entirely novel. PASSES.
MSM reweighting changes transition matrix, not just stationary distribution. Eigenmodes after reweighting differ from apo.
Retrospective + prospective validation. Reasonable.
Tafamidis, EGCG, Bowman & Geissler all correctly described.

critic_questions: How does eigenmode structure change after ligand binding? Is perturbative reweighting valid for strong binders?
Can fpocket/POVME identify pockets in IDP (Abeta42) conformations?
hypotheses.survival_note: Best citation accuracy (4/4). Novel drug design concept. Weakened by IDP pocket problem. Strongest fresh hypothesis.

hypotheses.title: Evolutionary Mpemba Tradeoff: Amyloidogenic Sequences Persist Because High Mpemba Index Enables Rapid Native Folding at the Cost of Deep Misfolding Traps

attacks.finding: CRITICAL: Predicts Mpemba index correlates with folding rate for >=6 proteins. But Abeta42, alpha-synuclein, tau are IDPs with NO DEFINED FOLDING RATE. Prediction untestable for half the relevant proteins.
Plaxco 1998: folding rate correlates with contact order, not eigenvalue structure. Mpemba index must predict beyond what CO explains. Partial correlation controlling for CO needed but not proposed.
Evolutionary tradeoff concept compelling. Spectral argument coherent for structured proteins only.
All 3 verified: Drummond & Wilke 2008 (Cell 134:341), Tartaglia 2007, Ciryam 2017. No errors.
M vs expression confounded by known expression-aggregation correlation. IDP folding rate absence problematic.
Dual-use evolutionary metric framing genuinely novel.
Grand claim for limited evidence base.
All factual claims verified.
Reducing spectral gap could make slow mode faster without affecting fast modes. Tradeoff not as rigid as claimed.

critic_questions: How compute Mpemba index and folding rate for IDPs with no stable native state?
Can Mpemba index predict folding rate beyond contact order? Include partial correlation.
Is spectral gap tradeoff rigid or could evolution reduce slow mode isolation without affecting fast modes?
hypotheses.survival_note: Novel but undermined for IDPs. Must restrict scope to non-IDP amyloid proteins (TTR, lysozyme, beta-2-microglobulin).

hypotheses.title: Spectral Entropy Production Rate Distinguishes Folding from Misfolding Pathways in Non-Equilibrium Protein Dynamics

attacks.finding: Sigma-spike mechanism physically motivated. D_misfold/D_fold ~10^-3 from Yu 2015 experimentally measured. Schnakenberg formula exact for CT Markov chains. Spike magnitude estimate uses 1D Zwanzig formula -- quantitative uncertainty.

Prigogine minimum entropy production applies only near equilibrium. Protein misfolding likely far-from-equilibrium. However D_KL(P(t)||P_eq) monotonically decreases for any Markov chain, providing support.
STRONG: 70% A*-trajectories spike >3x; 80% native monotonic; clear refutation; Mann-Whitney appropriate. PASSES.
Schnakenberg formula requires accurate rates for low-population states. MSM errors largest for misfolding intermediates. Noise could mimic spikes.
All 4 verified: Schnakenberg 1976, Seifert 2012, Yu 2015, Zwanzig 1988. No errors.
Entropy production spike as misfolding diagnostic entirely novel. PASSES.
Both sides use same Markov chain formalism. Clean and strong.
Appropriately scoped with cross-protein extension.
Yu D values, Zwanzig formula, Schnakenberg formula all verified.

critic_questions: How distinguish genuine sigma-spikes from MSM estimation noise?
Is Prigogine's linear regime valid for protein folding, or use general Schnakenberg?
hypotheses.survival_note: Best grounded fresh hypothesis. All citations verified, mechanism motivated, predictions sharp. Strongest alongside H5.

hypotheses.title: Refined Hierarchical Spectral Scoring with Yu et al. D_misfold Calibration and Cross-Validation Against TANGO/CamSol

attacks.finding: Yu et al. measured D ratio for PrP dimers under mechanical force, not solution conditions. D ratio under force may differ by orders of magnitude from zero-force.
k_n ~ k_+ * M_eff * c^(n_c) addresses single-to-multi molecule gap. But k_+ varies by orders of magnitude across proteins -- assumption that M_eff dominates rank-ordering is unverified.
STRONG: epsilon range, rho = 0.4-0.7 (self-refuting), disagreement analysis, concentration test. PASSES strongly.
All 4 verified: Yu 2015, Cohen 2012, Fernandez-Escamilla 2004, Cohen 2013. Best groundedness.
Incremental refinement of cycle 1 framework. Moderate novelty.
Most complete causal chain in suite. Each step has literature. Strongest bridge.
Zwanzig rearrangement correct. epsilon_misfold ~ 3.3 kT from D ratio = 10^3. Math checks out.
8-protein panel, TANGO cross-validation, 3 concentrations. Appropriate.
TANGO accuracy, Cohen nucleation, CamSol all verified.

critic_questions: How well does force spectroscopy D ratio from PrP generalize to other proteins under solution conditions?
Derive (not assume) that k_+ varies less than M_eff across the panel.
hypotheses.survival_note: Best groundedness, best testability with self-refutation. Weakened by force-spectroscopy extrapolation. Top-ranked.

hypotheses.title: Mpemba Index from Patient-Derived Tau PTM Variants as Personalized Tauopathy Progression Biomarker

attacks.finding: CRITICAL: 'Wesseling et al. 2020, Cell 180:633' is MISATTRIBUTED. Cell 180:633 is Arakhamia et al. (cryo-EM tau filament structures). Wesseling et al. is Cell 183:1699-1713. Wrong volume, wrong pages, different paper.
Tau-K18 is IDP. MSM construction for IDPs is unsolved. 500 us MD may fail before Mpemba index is computable.
PTM effects context-dependent (Wesseling actual finding). Fixed Mpemba ordering ignores this. CSF p-tau ratios reflect clearance kinetics, not just conformational properties.
Predictions require 500 us IDP MD + MSM construction -- feasibility questionable. Clinical prediction (ADNI) is long-term.
Wesseling wrong volume/pages. Palmqvist 2020: VERIFIED. 1/3 has wrong details.
PTM-dependent Mpemba index as biomarker is novel.
MD -> MSM -> Mpemba -> CSF ratio -> cognitive decline: too many unvalidated steps.
Weakest link: IDP MSM construction. Each step introduces uncertainty.
FACTUAL ERROR: T217 is at position 217, OUTSIDE K18 fragment (residues 244-372). p-T217 cannot directly perturb K18 eigenmode.

critic_questions: Correct Wesseling citation: Cell 183:1699, not Cell 180:633.
T217 outside K18 (residues 244-372). How can p-T217 perturb K18 eigenmode?
hypotheses.survival_note: Citation error, T217 topology error, IDP MSM feasibility, clinical overreach. Could be rescued with structured amyloid proteins.

hypotheses.title: Cooling-Rate-Dependent Fibril Polymorph Selection in Insulin: Refined T_cross Prediction with Three-Arm Mechanism Discrimination

attacks.finding: Polymorphism may be stochastic. But three-arm design tests this: stochastic predicts mixed at intermediate rate; eigenmode predicts specific polymorph. Design anticipates concern.
Insulin pH 2 is partially unfolded, NOT IDP -- MSM feasible. Mapping eigenmodes to polymorph basins plausible but undemonstrated.
STRONGEST: T_cross (45-55C +/-5C), three arms, cryo-EM/FTIR/ssNMR, clear refutation. Three-arm intermediate rate is critical innovation.
All 3 verified: Jimenez 2002, Nielsen 2001, Klich 2019. Clean.
Eigenmode T_cross prediction and Ostwald discriminant novel. Good PrP -> insulin evolution from cycle 1.
Direct and well-constrained. c_k(T) is computable. Strong.
No errors. Standard MSM quantities.
Exemplary: one system, one prediction, one discriminant.
Insulin polymorphs, FTIR, ssNMR all verified.

critic_questions: Evidence that v_2, v_3 correspond to polymorph basins rather than folding intermediates?
hypotheses.survival_note: SURVIVES. Best scoped, most testable. All citations verified. Three-arm discriminant. Insulin pH 2 feasible. Good cycle 1 learning.

hypotheses.title: Chaperone-Modulated Mpemba Index: Hsp70 Binding Selectively Reduces Slow-Eigenmode Overlap, Constituting a Biological Mpemba Protocol

attacks.finding: Holo MSM (zero-population bound states) is crude. Proper treatment needs coupled protein-chaperone MSM. Zero-population may create rank-deficient matrices.

Hsp70 recognition involves specific Leu-enriched motif (Rudiger 1997), not just hydrophobic overlap. Also: 2018 literature shows Hsp70 interacts poorly with Abeta42 monomers but strongly with oligomers. Hypothesis may focus on wrong aggregation state.
>70% co-localization, 3-fold reduction, clear refutation at <30%. Age simulation creative. Good testability.
All 4 verified: Rudiger 1997, Powers 2009, Taipale 2010, Mayer & Bukau 2005. No errors.
Hsp70 as biological Mpemba protocol genuinely novel and evocative.
Central untested assumption: Hsp70 sites map to high-|v_slow| microstates. If fails (<30%), bridge collapses.
tau_rebind/tau_slow ~ 10^-3 reasonable order-of-magnitude. Depends on Hsp70 concentration.
Large but each step testable.
Rudiger 1997 correct. Co-chaperone specificity more complex than stated.

critic_questions: Does zero-population holo MSM create rank-deficient matrices with artifactual eigenspectra?
Should hypothesis focus on oligomer-level rather than monomer-level eigenmode overlap?
hypotheses.survival_note: Creative framing, clean citations. Weakened by crude holo MSM and monomer-vs-oligomer question. Moderately wounded.

critic_questions.question: Avanzini et al. 2026 PRX 16:011065 citation appears fabricated. Resource-theoretic Mpemba paper is Summer et al. arXiv 2507.16976, not PRX, no Avanzini.
D_KL spectral decomposition may be chi-squared divergence, not KL divergence. Verify.
How compute Mpemba index and folding rate for IDPs with no stable native state?
Wesseling is Cell 183:1699, not Cell 180:633. T217 outside K18 (244-372). How can p-T217 perturb K18 eigenmode?
Citation hallucination persists: H1 new fabrication (Avanzini), H6 misattributes Wesseling. Generator claimed all cycle 1 errors fixed.
Single-molecule MSM to multi-molecule aggregation gap persists except in H5.

summary.cross_hypothesis_weakness: Citation hallucination persists. H1 fabricated Avanzini PRX. H6 misattributes Wesseling and has T217 topology error. IDP MSM feasibility affects H3, H6. Single-to-multi molecule gap unaddressed except H5.
summary.cycle_comparison: Cycle 2 improvement: 1 SURVIVES (vs 0 cycle 1), 0 KILLED (vs 2 cycle 1), fewer citation errors (2 vs 5). Fresh H2/H4 well-grounded. PrP->insulin evolution (H7) shows learning. Persistent citation fabrication concerning.
